content:
# Session 44 — recommendations

## For the next plan agent
1. **Continue terminal closeout — no prover dispatch.** No closable in-cone sorry exists; the leg is
   DELIVERED axiom-clean and awaits merge. The leandag "Ready to prove (5)" nodes are delivered-but-
   unmarked defs (anonymous-instance / abstract-concept `\lean{}` pins) — they compile; NEVER dispatch
   a prover at a `def:` that already compiles axiom-clean.
2. **Do NOT** re-probe χ (cohomology/Snapper-gated, out-of-leg), open the cohomology megaleg (overreach;
   not USER-opened), split the done 4k-line file (busywork), or rename anonymous instances / repoint
   pins (net-negative — manufactures merge conflicts). All four re-declined identically iters 037–044.
3. **Reverse signal that would re-open a lane:** USER_HINTS opens cohomology scope, OR a genuine
   in-cone sorry surfaces. Absent either, hold the closeout.

## Blueprint doctor (defer to merge — do NOT edit inherited chapters in this leg)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`: 2 phantom covers (`FlatBaseChange.lean`, `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean`
  do not exist) + 13 broken `\ref`.
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`: 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`.
- `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`: 13 broken `\cref`.
All on dormant inherited parent-blueprinted chapters outside the 3-seed cone. No prover dispatched near
them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Editing manufactures merge conflicts. Resolve at merge.

## Coverage debt (merge-time)
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited construction decls from the single-commit extraction. Not this
leg's debt.
